Manufacturing data management, test applications, commands, serials, and results UI for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[asterix](asterix/README.md)**: Manages manufacturing data storage and retrieval, including watch color, model, RTC frequency, and test results.
- **[mfg_apps](mfg_apps/README.md)**: Manufacturing test applications and headers for Bluetooth, display, flash, battery, and button tests in Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_mode](mfg_mode/README.md)**: Functions for managing manufacturing mode, checking its status, and performing hardware self-tests.
- **[robert](robert/README.md)**: Manages manufacturing information such as watch color, RTC frequency, and model data.
- **[silk](silk/README.md)**: Manages manufacturing data for Pebble firmware, including watch color, model, and test results.
- **[snowy](snowy/README.md)**: Manages boot FPGA bitstream and manufacturing data, including color, RTC frequency, and model info.
- **[spalding](spalding/README.md)**: Manages FPGA bitstream data, manufacturing data storage, and related functions.
- **[tintin](tintin/README.md)**: Functions for managing manufacturing information like watch color and RTC frequency.

## Files
- **[mfg_command.c](mfg_command.c.md)**: Implements manufacturing commands for reading and writing device settings and bootloader testing.
- **[mfg_command.h](mfg_command.h.md)**: Functions for initializing manufacturing commands and reading the serial number in firmware.
- **[mfg_info.c](mfg_info.c.md)**: Implements functions to retrieve serial numbers and hardware version for manufacturing info.
- **[mfg_info.h](mfg_info.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing and retrieving manufacturing information of a watch.
- **[mfg_serials.c](mfg_serials.c.md)**: Manages manufacturing serial numbers, hardware versions, and PCBA serial numbers with read and write operations.
- **[mfg_serials.h](mfg_serials.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing manufacturing serial numbers and hardware version information.
- **[results_ui.c](results_ui.c.md)**: Implements a user interface for manufacturing test results with pass/fail options and callbacks.
- **[results_ui.h](results_ui.h.md)**: Defines the MfgResultsUI structure and functions for initializing and setting callbacks for manufacturing test results.
